item.title: Baillie Gifford launches tokenized Solana and Ethereum fund with BNY Mellon as TradFi expands into onchain assets
Bank of England eases stablecoin issuance rules with a 40B pound cap, signaling regulatory thaw
Morgan Stanley amends Ethereum and Solana ETF filings with record-low management fees to drive adoption
Charles Schwab partners with Cboe to launch prediction markets, taking aim at Polymarket and Kalshi
Taiko halts Ethereum L2 network after bridge exploit; protocol token drops sharply
Q2 2026 sets crypto hack record with 83 incidents reported, exceeding any prior quarter
South Korea expands FATF Travel Rule to cover smaller crypto transfers
Microsoft warns of CryptoBandits malware that uses USB drives to access cryptocurrency wallets
Strategy buys an additional 520 bitcoin, expanding corporate reserves to $1.4 billion
Kraken lists 2,500 unapproved Solana tokens via on-chain access; says risk remains on chain
Bitwise rolls out crypto model portfolios on retail platforms, broadening institutional access
Ethereum proposal would cut staker rewards to fund ongoing protocol development
WSJ: $1.9M in fake bets drove Polymarket's recent activity hype, raising prediction market integrity questions
Sweden launches krona-denominated stablecoin; analysts caution dollar liquidity gap remains wide
